title: Innodata Inc (INOD) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Surge and Strategic Customer Wins
text: Innodata delivered impressive third-quarter performance with record revenue of $52 million for Q3 2024, marking a 136% year-over-year increase. The company's profitability expanded significantly, generating adjusted EBITDA for the quarter was $13.9 million, representing 27% of revenue. Net income surged to $17.4 million compared to just $371,000 in the same quarter last year. The adjusted gross margin improved to 44% in Q3 from 33% in Q2, reflecting operational improvements and lower recruiting costs. A major technology customer contributed $30.6 million in Q3 revenue. Additionally, the company secured a new engagement with a prominent social media platform, expected to generate $3 million in annualized revenue, expanding its customer diversification. Management anticipates Q4 2024 revenue between $52-55 million, translating to 88% to 92% year-over-year growth for full year 2024. The company also increased its cash reserves to $26.4 million, up $10 million from the previous quarter.
